title: Sample preparation for PIV in organ-on-a-chip device
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4nl8","text":"The protocol describes preparation of samples to be used in PIV measurements performed in OOC devices. Keep in mind that the substances and variables may change significantly depending on the optical system and OOC device used.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Take 50 µL of tracer particle solution (example: 1 μm Nile Red; must be chosen for the laser used in PIV and the optical system) and add to Sample
Shake for 00:00:05 in a lab tube shaker
Place for 00:30:00 in an ultrasonic bath
The sample is now prepared for PIV measurements. It cannot be reliably expected to retain colloidal stability for more than 01:00:00
creator: Viesturs Sints
